name: shutterstock
description: Reads Shutterstock media, collection, license, editorial, catalog, contributor, and subscription metadata; writes collection/lightbox metadata through safe collection endpoints.

risk.read: external Shutterstock API read of media, collections, licenses, editorial, catalog, contributor, and subscription metadata
risk.approval: required before collection write actions; licensing and download endpoints are not exposed as writes
risk.write: external Shutterstock collection/lightbox create, rename, delete, and item-add mutations; licensing/download writes are intentionally excluded
